benefits.description: Hoping to suppress food noise and binge eating

protocol_notes: Reconstituting 5mg vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Plans to inject subcutaneously 2cm from belly button. Initial 5mg vial expected to last 5 weeks. Thyroid medication dose has been corrected after previous overdose incident. Storing in garage (8°C winter temperature) due to household situation. Plans to order additional supply from reliable vendor for continuation after initial 5mg exhausted.
